home.heroSub: I talk to innovators from various industries about their personal 'state of innovation' — what works in practice, what has changed, and what comes next.
home.trusted: Trusted by Liebherr, Eaton, Teleflex, Mitsubishi & more
home.aboutBody1: Prior to founding MYLES Strategy & Innovation GmbH in January 2023, Martin spent almost 20 years as Managing Partner at EDIZON Innovation, building it into one of Europe's leading companies for Outcome-Driven Innovation. He is the only licensed ODI® partner in Europe, working in close collaboration with Tony Ulwick and the team at Strategyn (USA).
home.aboutBody2: Martin has previously worked on numerous restructuring projects as a senior consultant at Roland Berger and has learned to translate validated customer needs into service offerings that deliver a reliable return on investment.
home.latestSub: What are the key topics? What has changed? What comes next?
home.keynoteTeaserBody: Together with innovators from companies and the innovation community, Martin provides insights into what works (and what doesn't) in practice, inspires new approaches, and connects experts with responsibility for business results.
home.teaserCard1Body: Methodology-based growth strategy that outperforms traditional approaches 5×.
home.teaserCard2Body: Understanding what customers truly hire your product to do.
home.teaserCard3Body: Building bridges between technology and business value.
home.teaserCard4Body: Navigating the intersection of innovation and AI.
home.ctaSub: Book Martin as a keynote speaker or apply as a podcast guest.

podcast.heroSub: I talk to innovators from various industries about their personal 'state of innovation'. What topics are of most concern? What has changed in the way innovation is done? How will innovation evolve? Together with guests from companies and the innovation community, we provide insights, inspire new approaches, and connect experts with responsibility for business results.
podcast.noResults: No episodes found for your search.

keynote.heroTitle: Innovation as a methodology, not a miracle.
keynote.heroSub: Martin Pattera delivers keynotes that inspire action and provide concrete frameworks — built on 20+ years of hands-on innovation work with enterprises across Europe and beyond.
keynote.speakerBio1: Prior to founding MYLES Strategy & Innovation GmbH in January 2023, Martin spent almost 20 years as Managing Partner at EDIZON Innovation, building it into one of Europe's leading companies for Outcome-Driven Innovation. During this time, he built a close working partnership with Tony Ulwick and the team at Strategyn (USA) — making him the only licensed ODI® partner in Europe.
keynote.speakerBio2: Martin has previously worked on numerous restructuring projects as a senior consultant at Roland Berger and has learned to translate validated customer needs into service offerings that deliver a reliable return on investment.
keynote.topic1Body: Developed by Tony Ulwick (Strategyn, USA), Martin is the only licensed partner for Outcome-Driven Innovation® in Europe — bringing the world's most rigorous innovation methodology to European enterprises.
keynote.topic2Body: How leading companies use JTBD to build products customers actually want — with real-world case studies from Liebherr, Eaton, Teleflex and more.
keynote.topic3Body: How the PM role is evolving and what it takes to build great products in an AI-driven world.
keynote.topic4Body: Navigating the intersection of innovation, technology, and organisational change — with a proven framework.
keynote.t1Quote: I really enjoy working with Martin and the team. They have great rigour to their process and deliver quality volumes of impartial data that can be digested in a relatively straightforward way. Always good to have those challenging discussions to drive new ways of thinking — he is an enthusiastic partner in innovation.
keynote.t2Quote: Through the application of systematic market research, we can better understand customer needs. ODI methodology enables us to increase customer value and a unique selling proposition. We learned a lot from our customers and for our customers by applying ODI to our innovation management.
keynote.t3Quote: We had a product ready and due to the fact that a sales manager left suddenly 'the market disappeared'. To make sure this does not happen again we found JTBD thinking provided by Edizon (now MYLES). We already did several projects together and are now doing internal trainings to implement ODI in our organisation.
keynote.t4Quote: In more than 20 years of practice in research targeted to product development I never came across such a valuable and constructive approach as Jobs-to-be-Done and Outcome-Driven Innovation. It is definitely best practice to uncover actionable customer needs and reveal business opportunities.
keynote.t4Role: Manager Product Planning & Market Research, Mitsubishi R&D Europe
keynote.teaching1: Vienna University of Economics and Business
keynote.teaching2: University of Applied Sciences — Austrian Marketing University
keynote.teaching4: DTU Executive School of Business (Prof. Sören Salomo)
keynote.teaching7: Best Practice Classes at Fortune 500 companies (2-day)
keynote.teaching8: PFI events in Austria and Germany
keynote.ctaTitle: Book Martin for your next event

booking.heroSub: Book Martin as a keynote speaker for your event, or apply to be a guest on The State of Innovation podcast.
booking.speakerSub: Fill out the form below and Martin's team will get back to you within 2 business days.
booking.guestSub: Think you'd be a great fit for the podcast? Tell us about yourself.
booking.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your event, the audience, and what you hope to achieve…
booking.fieldTopicPlaceholder: What would you like to talk about? What's your unique angle on innovation?
booking.fieldAudiencePlaceholder: Describe the listeners this episode would resonate with most.
booking.successMsg: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Innovation is not chance — it's a method.
footer.company: Part of MYLES Strategy & Innovation GmbH
